author: European Commission
title: Standard Eurobarometer 100: Autumn 2023
notes: Biannual survey of EU citizens' attitudes; includes time-series data on trust in EU institutions and support for EU-level decision-making.

author: European Commission
title: Standard Eurobarometer 101: Spring 2024
notes: Latest available wave at time of build. Data Room charts cite this vintage.

author: Eurostat
title: Gross domestic product (GDP) at market prices — nama_10_gdp
notes: Used for member-state GDP share visualisation in the Data Room.

author: Stockholm International Peace Research Institute
title: SIPRI Military Expenditure Database
notes: Annual defence-spending data by country used in the defence-fragmentation chart.

author: Michael Burgess
title: Comparative Federalism: Theory and Practice
notes: Standard comparative federalism text; chapter 8 addresses European federalism.

author: Andrew Duff
title: On European Federalism: What the Leaders Think
notes: Policy paper by the Liberal MEP who co-drafted the Spinelli Group's Fundamental Law.

shortTitle: Verhofstadt — The United States of Europe (2006)
author: Guy Verhofstadt
title: The United States of Europe
publisher: Federal Trust for Education and Research
notes: Verhofstadt's case for a European federation, republished in updated editions.

shortTitle: Jacques Delors Institute — renewing the EU (2022)
author: Jacques Delors Institute
title: Renewing the European Union: Proposals for a New Architecture
notes: Think-tank founded by, and honouring the legacy of, Jacques Delors, the Commission president most associated with the Single Market and Maastricht.

shortTitle: Bruegel — EU Foreign and Security Policy (2023)
author: Bruegel
title: European foreign and security policy: A new EU competence?
notes: Brussels-based economics think tank; regular publisher on EU institutional reform.

author: Various
title: Journal of Common Market Studies
publisher: Wiley / University Association for Contemporary European Studies
notes: Leading peer-reviewed journal for EU studies. Relevant special issues on federalism and institutional reform.

author: European Communities
title: Treaty Establishing the European Economic Community

author: European Communities
title: Treaty on European Union (Maastricht Treaty)
notes: Original 1992 text. For consolidated version see EUR-Lex C 202/1.

author: European Union
title: Treaty of Lisbon
notes: Amending the TEU and TFEU; in force 1 December 2009.

author: Altiero Spinelli and Ernesto Rossi
title: For a Free and United Europe: A Draft Manifesto
notes: Archival scan and translation available at CVCE.eu.
